anonymous.description: Name used for a PREreviewer who doesn’t have a public name on their ORCID record.

prereviewsTitle.description: Title of the section that lists the PREreviews published by the PREreviewer.

noResults.description: Message shown when the PREreviewer hasn’t published any PREreviews.

noResultsAnonymous.message: This person hasn’t published a PREreview yet.
noResultsAnonymous.description: Message shown when the PREreviewer hasn’t published any PREreviews.

appearHere.message: When they do, it’ll appear here.
appearHere.description: Message shown alongside the text “{name} hasn’t published a PREreview yet.”

slackName.description: Label for the Slack Community name of the PREreviewer.

careerStage.description: Label for the career stage of the PREreviewer.

careerStageEarly.description: Text shown when the PREreviewer has chosen the early career stage option.

careerStageMid.description: Text shown when the PREreviewer has chosen the mid career stage option.

careerStageLate.description: Text shown when the PREreviewer has chosen the late career stage option.

researchInterests.description: Label for the research interests of the PREreviewer.

location.description: Label for the location of the PREreviewer.

languages.description: Label for the languages spoken by the PREreviewer.

clubs.description: Label for the Clubs the PREreviewer is a lead for.

openForRequests.message: {name} is happy to take requests for a PREreview.
openForRequests.description: Message shown when the PREreviewer is happy to take requests for a PREreview.

openForRequestsAnonymous.message: This person is happy to take requests for a PREreview.
openForRequestsAnonymous.description: Message shown when the PREreviewer is happy to take requests for a PREreview.

contactSlack.message: They can be contacted on our <link>Slack Community</link>.
contactSlack.description: Message shown alongside the text “This person is happy to take requests for a PREreview.”
